positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of celestial botanicals and arcane fauna, centered composition. The main subject features glowing, ethereal flowers and interconnected vine structures growing around a crescent moon and constellation map. Use a Neo-Art Nouveau style combined with sacred geometry. The color palette should be restricted but rich: deep indigo, cosmic violet, teal, highlighted with glowing gold and pale emerald green. The lines must be sharp and crisp, creating strong, defined silhouettes against a flat, solid background. High contrast, clean lines, maximalist yet organized, suitable for a repeatable apparel print, graphic vector quality, no gradients on the background.
negative: blurry, noisy, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, grainy, jpeg artifacts, messy, cluttered background, bad anatomy, extra limbs, photo, photorealistic, bokeh
